name: search_drive_files
description: Search the operator's Google Drive for files (any type) using an optional Drive query string. Returns a list of files with their id (use it with get_drive_file / delete_drive_file), name, mimeType, modifiedTime, size, and a shareable webViewLink.

query.description: Optional. A raw Google Drive `q` search expression. Omit to list recent files. Examples: "name contains 'budget'", "mimeType='application/pdf'", "modifiedTime > '2026-01-01T00:00:00'".

page_size.description: Optional. Max number of files to return (default 20).

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON array of file objects {id, name, mimeType, modifiedTime, size, webViewLink} (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator (Drive scope granted by the Google sign-in in onboarding). `query` is the RAW Drive API q expression: combine clauses with `and`, e.g. "mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.document' and name contains 'notes'". Take a file id from the results and pass it to get_drive_file to read content.
